title: Optical module having multi-mode coupler formed on semiconductor substrate
abstract: An optical module that implements an MMI device including an optical hybrid primarily made of semiconductor material is disclosed. The MMI device, which has a rectangular plane shape and includes multi-mode couplers, is mounted on a carrier. The carrier provides a step extending in a whole lateral width of a top surface thereof, where the step makes a gap against the MMI device in an area where the MMI couplers are formed.
claims: Claims ( 11 ) An optical module, comprising: a multi-mode interference (MMI) device that includes a semiconductor substrate having a multi-mode interference (MMI) coupler and waveguides, the waveguides longitudinally extending from the MMI coupler in a top surface of the semiconductor substrate; and a carrier that mounts the MMI device thereon through solder, wherein the MMI device has an area in a back surface of the semiconductor substrate, the area being not fixed to the carrier, overlapping with the MMI coupler in the top surface of the semiconductor substrate, and extending in an overall lateral width of the substrate. The optical module of Claim 1, wherein the carrier has a step extending in an overall lateral width thereof, the step corresponding to the area of the semiconductor substrate of the MMI device and forming a gap against the semiconductor substrate of the MMI device. The optical module of Claim 1, wherein the back surface of the semiconductor substrate has a back metal except for the area not fixed to the carrier, the back metal being fixed to the carrier through the solder. The optical module of Claim 4, wherein the back metal is made of gold (Au). The optical module of Claim 1, wherein the carrier has expansion co-efficient greater than expansion co-efficient of the semiconductor substrate. The optical module of Claim 5, wherein the carrier is made of aluminum oxide (Al 2 O 3 ), and the semiconductor substrate is made of indium phosphide (InP). The optical module of Claim 5, wherein the semiconductor substrate at the area thereof receives a compressing stress greater than 20 MPa along the longitudinal direction but substantially no compressing stress along the lateral direction. The optical module of Claim 1, wherein the MMI coupler includes a 2Ã4 MMI coupler and a 2Ã2 MMI coupler optically coupled with the 2Ã4 MMI coupler. The optical module of Claim 8, wherein the 2Ã4 MMI coupler and the 2Ã2 MMI coupler have rectangular plane shape having longitudinal edges along which the waveguides are longitudinally extended. The optical module of Claim 1, wherein the carrier is mounted on a base made of copper tungsten (CuW). The optical module of Claim 1, wherein the MMI device monolithically integrates photodiodes (PDs) optically coupled with the MMI coupler through the waveguides.
